rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v13 Task 4a (incl. AM-40 PACKAGE_ROOTS ruling and D17/AM-17) with zero reinterpretation or scope expansion. inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS (five TELOS spine) + explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE (three siblings), DOC_ROOTS + docs/runs + self-weave exclusions, exact CONTRACT_FILES (D31), LEDGER_SOURCES=[], RUN_SOURCES (exact reviewed), five weaver ids + integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS exactly equal to the frozen normative table (unit-proven deep-equal + freeze + mutation resistance), LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS exactly {module,node:module} -> ["builtinModules","isBuiltin"] (deep-frozen, units for equality/keys/values/freeze/mutation), and WEAVER_IMPL_FILES ONLY for the existing git+code weavers (closures proven equal to derived via shared D33 classifier/resolver; no nonexistent files named). util.mjs exports the single shared D33 classifyModuleLoads + resolveRelativeSpecifier (AM-34 test 19 proves sole definitions + both consumers import/call them; no second resolver or .mjs append elsewhere), dependency-free comment/string/regex-aware lexer, Phase-1 export scanner (exactly function|async function|const|class), real-file walker (rejects escape + symlinked input/components, sorted canonical POSIX), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; accounting solely via driver-held accessor; partial/break/exhaustion units), D21 physical-containment (lstat every component of allowed-root + candidate chain, reject any symlink, never follow to decide; units for ancestor/nested/escape/root cases), and no-shell git wrapper (exact subcommands/arg shapes only, path-arg canonical, spawn options fixed last). test-closure.mjs derives each committed weaver closure with the shared classifier/resolver, proves WEAVER_IMPL_FILES EQUAL the derived lists (never trusted; existence + set+order), and covers every accepted form via form-only fixture (omission fails equality) plus recursion/cycles/conditional-dynamic/permitted-merkle-dag + all fatal (missing/extra/nonexistent/unresolved/ambiguous-extension/symlink/non-regular/escape/forbidden/entry) and no-edge (nonliteral/comment/string/non-relative) modes. git.mjs emits introduced-by exactly via the two frozen log shapes, takes first result as git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns, full source exhaustion. code.mjs emits depends-on across all four endpoint shapes (symbol-level for used named-to-seeded-export; file-level fallback for namespace/side-effect/named-not-seeded; repository-file consumer when no Phase-1 export, including repository-file->code-symbol), unrepresentable-consumer ONLY for genuinely unresolvable (missing or outside closed roots), unused/comment/string emit no edge, dedup, physical-policy throw on symlink/escape. Zero runtime deps, ESM, only node:/clotho-relative/permitted-merkle-dag, spine read-only, confined, gate green (test-all + check + zero-deps + imports + confined). Orchestrator/D34/test/doc/ledger weavers correctly deferred to 4b/5. Stakes signature: approve.
